org.moeaframework.analysis.diagnostics.ResultKey

Package
Description
org.moeaframework.analysis.diagnostics
Diagnostic tool for analyzing the runtime behavior of algorithms.

  • Uses of ResultKey in org.moeaframework.analysis.diagnostics

    Method
    Description
    Set<ResultKey>
    Controller.getKeys()
    Returns an unmodifiable set of result keys contained in this controller.

    DiagnosticTool.getSelectedResults()
    Returns a list of the selected results.

    Generate the individual series for the specified key.

    Controller.get(ResultKey key)
    Returns an unmodifiable collection containing the results associated with the specified key.

    Returns the action to display the approximation set for the given result.
